title: The Camera That Saw Beyond Visible Light
short_teaser: Scientists discovered that the world contains information we cannot see with our eyes.
story: Different types of cameras and sensors allow people to observe things beyond normal human vision. These technologies have helped scientists study space, nature, health, and the environment.
impact: New tools allow us to discover possibilities that were always there but hidden.
spark_application: What opportunity might exist that you have not noticed yet?
